description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat, dark gray roof and a white brick exterior. The front facade features large, vertically oriented windows with metal frames and a balcony with glass or acrylic railings. The rear of the house includes a private balcony area with a hot tub, potted plants, and a sliding glass door leading inside. The side walls are mostly solid, with minimal window openings, emphasizing privacy. The entryway is defined by a double gate and planters integrated into the front wall, adding greenery to the urban setting. The overall design is sleek and contemporary, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation.
description: A modern two-story house with a white brick exterior, large vertical windows, and a flat dark roof. Features include a front balcony, rear hot tub area, and integrated planters.
description_view_0: Rear view showing a balcony with a hot tub, sliding glass door, and tall potted plant.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the balcony, hot tub, and the solid white brick wall with minimal windows.
description_view_2: Front view displaying large vertical windows, a balcony with glass railings, double entry gate, and planters.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a completely solid white brick wall and the flat roofline.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows of large vertical windows on the front facade
attribute_entryway_design: Double gate entry with integrated planters, no visible porch, and a minimalist, modern aesthetic
